title: API Model Creator Badge
subtitle: Minimal model created via Kaggle API for the API Model Creator badge.
description:
## Overview
Model created using the Kaggle API to earn the [API Model Creator](https://www.kaggle.com/progression/badges) badge. 

Done via API (badges should already be live)
API Model Creator and Model Variation Creator were earned by running:
Model: kaggle.com/models/cameronwarrennn/api-model-creator-badge
Variation 1: PyTorch / pytorch-small
Variation 2: PyTorch / pytorch-large
So you already have:
API Model Creator (created a model via the Kaggle API)
Model Variation Creator (same model with two variations)
provenanceSources: Created via Kaggle API for the API Model Creator badge. Minimal demo model.
